## The question

<!-- State the question. For open/system-design questions, keep it a real decision, not trivia. -->

## Type

- [ ] Multiple-choice (with per-option *why*)
- [ ] Open / system-design

## Topic

<!-- One of: retrieval · embeddings · chunking · reranking · evaluation · production · security -->

## Difficulty

- [ ] 🟢 Core
- [ ] 🟡 Senior
- [ ] 🔴 Staff

## Provenance (for real questions)

- [ ] ✅ Reported — link the public source: <!-- url -->
- [ ] 🔮 Representative — realistic and in-style, not attributed

## For multiple-choice — the options + why

```
- ✅ [correct] — why it's right (tie to a mechanism or metric)
- ▫️ [wrong]   — why it's wrong
- ▫️ [wrong]   — why it's wrong
```
